name: Combobox
description: A searchable select dropdown. Users must pick from a predefined list, with optional multi-select. Built on Base UI Combobox with StyleX styling.

Root.description: State container. Manages filtering, open state, value, and keyboard navigation. Renders no DOM element.

items.description: Items or grouped items to display in the dropdown list.

defaultValue.description: Initial selected value for uncontrolled mode.

onValueChange.type: (value: Value | Value[] | null, details: ChangeEventDetails) => void
onValueChange.description: Callback fired when the selected value changes.

multiple.description: Allow multiple items to be selected.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when the popup opens or closes.

onInputValueChange.description: Callback fired when the search input value changes.

filter.description: Custom filter function. Built-in contains filter used by default.

filteredItems.description: Externally filtered items (for async search). Bypasses built-in filter.

autoHighlight.description: Auto-highlight the first matching item as user types.

limit.description: Maximum number of visible items. -1 for unlimited.

size.description: Size of the trigger, input, and dropdown items. Aligns with Button sizes (sm=32px, md=36px, lg=40px).

getItemLabel.description: Convert an item to its display label for pills. Defaults to item.label, then item.value, then String(item).

Input.description: Main searchable input that opens the dropdown and filters items. Includes a built-in chevron icon (when empty) and clear button (when a value is selected).

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown when no value is selected.

dataAttributes.data-disabled: Present when the input is disabled.

Popup.description: Dropdown containing the item list. Portal, Positioner, and List are internalized.

dataAttributes.data-open: Present when the popup is open.
dataAttributes.data-closed: Present when the popup is closed.
dataAttributes.data-empty: Present when no items match the filter.

Item.description: A single selectable option in the dropdown.

value.description: The item value. Used for selection and filtering.

dataAttributes.data-highlighted: Present when the item has keyboard/pointer focus.
dataAttributes.data-selected: Present when the item is currently selected.
dataAttributes.data-disabled: Present when the item is disabled.

ItemIndicator.description: Checkmark icon shown when an item is selected. Renders a Check icon by default.

keepMounted.description: Keep in DOM when not selected (for animations).

dataAttributes.data-selected: Present when the parent item is selected.

Clear.description: Button to reset the selection. Built into Input by default; also available standalone.

Empty.description: Shown when no items match the current filter query.

Group.description: Groups related items with a label.

GroupLabel.description: Heading for a group of items.

cssRequirements.description: Popup fade and slide animation requires global CSS rules inside @layer priority1.

intents.reasoning: Combobox is the primary component for selecting from a predefined list with the ability to search/filter options.
intents.composition:
<Combobox.Root items={items}>
  <Combobox.Input placeholder="Select..." />
  <Combobox.Popup>
    <Combobox.Empty>No results found.</Combobox.Empty>
    {(item) => (
      <Combobox.Item key={item.id} value={item}>
        <Combobox.ItemIndicator />
        {item.value}
      </Combobox.Item>
    )}
  </Combobox.Popup>
</Combobox.Root>

intents.reasoning: Combobox provides a dropdown that filters options as the user types, ideal for long option lists.
Combobox with multiple mode allows selecting several items from a list with checkmark indicators.
intents.composition:
<Combobox.Root items={items} multiple>
  <Combobox.Input placeholder="Select items..." />
  <Combobox.Popup>
    <Combobox.Empty>No results.</Combobox.Empty>
    {(item) => (
      <Combobox.Item key={item.id} value={item}>
        <Combobox.ItemIndicator />
        {item.value}
      </Combobox.Item>
    )}
  </Combobox.Popup>
</Combobox.Root>

avoidWhen.reasoning: Use Autocomplete instead. Combobox requires selection from a predefined list — the value is a selection, not free text.

avoidWhen.scenario: Short fixed list of options (5 or fewer)
avoidWhen.reasoning: Use Select for small lists where search is unnecessary overhead. Combobox adds complexity with its filter input.
Use Input directly. Combobox is for selecting from options, not free-form text entry.

examples.name: basic
examples.code:
const fruits = [
  { id: 1, value: 'Apple' },
  { id: 2, value: 'Banana' },
  { id: 3, value: 'Cherry' },
];

<Combobox.Root items={fruits}>
  <Combobox.Input placeholder="Select a fruit..." />
  <Combobox.Popup>
    <Combobox.Empty>No fruits found.</Combobox.Empty>
    {(fruit) => (
      <Combobox.Item key={fruit.id} value={fruit}>
        <Combobox.ItemIndicator />
        {fruit.value}
      </Combobox.Item>
    )}
  </Combobox.Popup>
</Combobox.Root>

examples.name: multi-select
examples.code:
<Combobox.Root items={fruits} multiple>
  <Combobox.Input placeholder="Select fruits..." />
  <Combobox.Popup>
    <Combobox.Empty>No results.</Combobox.Empty>
    {(fruit) => (
      <Combobox.Item key={fruit.id} value={fruit}>
        <Combobox.ItemIndicator />
        {fruit.value}
      </Combobox.Item>
    )}
  </Combobox.Popup>
</Combobox.Root>

examples.name: grouped
examples.code:
<Combobox.Root items={groupedItems}>
  <Combobox.Input placeholder="Select produce..." />
  <Combobox.Popup>
    <Combobox.Empty>No results.</Combobox.Empty>
    {(group) => (
      <Combobox.Group key={group.label}>
        <Combobox.GroupLabel>{group.label}</Combobox.GroupLabel>
        {group.items.map((item) => (
          <Combobox.Item key={item.id} value={item}>
            <Combobox.ItemIndicator />
            {item.value}
          </Combobox.Item>
        ))}
      </Combobox.Group>
    )}
  </Combobox.Popup>
</Combobox.Root>
